description: Sentence and context recall SRS source of truth. Items are short, high-value prompts for Chinese-to-English retrieval.

items.zhPrompt: 請插入最後一把鑰匙。
items.answer: Insert the last key.

items.zhPrompt: 不要自己解鎖它。
items.answer: Do not unlock it alone.

items.zhPrompt: 我們一起打開它。
items.answer: We open it together.

items.zhPrompt: 選擇回程巴士。
items.answer: Choose the return bus.
items.hint: 看螢幕指示時常見的祈使句。

items.zhPrompt: 我們可以改名字嗎？
items.answer: Can we change the names?

items.zhPrompt: 那裡印出了一行新的字。
items.answer: A new line was printed there.
items.hint: 可用 A new line was printed ...

items.zhPrompt: 如果你看到 Return one rider, not two，你會怎麼確認意思？
items.answer: Does this mean only one rider can return? / Can only one rider return?
items.hint: 可用 Does this mean ...? / Can only one rider ...?

items.zhPrompt: 如果螢幕要你選回程巴士，但你不確定，你會怎麼問？
items.answer: Which bus should I choose? / Can you help me choose the return bus?
items.hint: 可用 Which bus ...? / Can you help me ...?

items.zhPrompt: 我需要現在送交這個。
items.answer: I need to deliver this now.
items.hint: 提示：I need to ... this now.

items.zhPrompt: 這是關於 8:10 路線的證據。
items.answer: This is proof about Route 8:10.

items.zhPrompt: 前台辦事員八點二十會離開。
items.answer: The front clerk leaves at 8:20.
items.hint: 注意 leave at 的時間說法。

items.zhPrompt: 你現在可以看這個嗎？
items.answer: Can you read this now?

items.zhPrompt: 那個警衛正在看那些紙。
items.answer: The guard is looking at the papers.

items.zhPrompt: 那個螢幕自己跳出來了。
items.answer: The service screen came up by itself.
items.hint: 可以用 came up by itself.

items.zhPrompt: 如果你要把重要資料交給站務人員，你會怎麼開口？
items.answer: I need to give this to the front clerk. / I need to deliver this now.
items.hint: 可用 I need to give this ... / I need to deliver this ...

items.zhPrompt: 如果你看到 one record was hidden，你會怎麼確認意思？
items.answer: Does this mean one record was hidden? / Was one record hidden?
items.hint: 可用 Does this mean ...? / Was ... hidden?

items.zhPrompt: 我叫 May Lin。
items.answer: My name is May Lin.

items.zhPrompt: 請把這些拿到前面辦公室。
items.answer: Please take these to the front office.

items.zhPrompt: 那份報告在哪裡？
items.answer: Where is the report?
items.hint: 先自己說；可用 Where is ...?

items.zhPrompt: 夜班警衛十分鐘後會離開。
items.answer: The night guard will leave in ten minutes.

items.zhPrompt: 為什麼你把那些訊息傳給我？
items.answer: Why did you send the messages to me?

items.zhPrompt: 我需要去站務室。
items.answer: I need to go to the station office.
items.hint: 可以用 I need to go to ...

items.zhPrompt: 如果你看到 return path only，你會怎麼確認意思？
items.answer: Does this mean return path only? / Is this only for the return path?
items.hint: 可以用 Does this mean ...? / Is this only for ...?

items.zhPrompt: 如果對方要你立刻把資料送去前面辦公室，你會怎麼回？
items.answer: I can take it to the front office now. / Okay, I will take it now.
items.hint: 可用 I can ... now. / Okay, I will ... now.

items.zhPrompt: 我現在該離開嗎？
items.answer: Should I leave now?

items.zhPrompt: 請沿著藍線走。
items.answer: Please follow the blue line.

items.zhPrompt: 這是安全出口嗎？
items.answer: Is this a safe exit?
items.hint: 先自己說；不要看英文關鍵字。

items.zhPrompt: 我需要決定。
items.answer: I need to decide.

items.zhPrompt: 請看手機上的舊貼文。
items.answer: Please check the old post on the phone.
items.hint: 情境：你要對方確認一則資訊。

items.zhPrompt: 那張紙上只有一個名字。
items.answer: The paper had only one name on it.

items.zhPrompt: 如果你在車站看到 safe exit，你會怎麼問工作人員？
items.answer: Is this the safe exit? / Should I follow this exit?
items.hint: 可以用 Is this ...? / Should I ...?

items.zhPrompt: 如果你不確定要不要上車，你會怎麼說？
items.answer: Should I get on the bus? / Should I leave now?
items.hint: 用今天的 survival sentence 改寫也可以。

items.zhPrompt: 這班巴士可以把 May Lin 帶回來嗎？
items.answer: Can this bus bring May Lin back?

items.zhPrompt: 我會留在這裡。
items.answer: I will stay here.

items.zhPrompt: 螢幕在兩個名字之間切換。
items.answer: The screen switched between two names.
items.hint: 先自己說；可用 The screen ...

items.zhPrompt: 請出示舊報告作為證明。
items.answer: Please show the old report as proof.

items.zhPrompt: 一位乘客可以回來。
items.answer: One rider can return.
items.hint: 注意 one rider 的人數限制。

items.zhPrompt: 如果你不確定要留下還是上車，你會怎麼問？
items.answer: Should I stay here or get on the bus? / Should I wait here?

items.zhPrompt: 你看到 Route closed. Return complete.，會怎麼告訴朋友？
items.answer: The route is closed. The return is complete. / The bus route is closed now.

items.zhPrompt: 你要請朋友一起處理這件事，會怎麼說？
items.answer: Can we do this together? / Can you help me with this?

items.zhPrompt: 我想去城市博物館。
items.answer: I want to visit the city museum.
items.hint: 提示：I want to visit the city ...

items.zhPrompt: 12 號路線延誤了。
items.answer: Route 12 is delayed.

items.zhPrompt: 請問這班車會到博物館嗎？
items.answer: Does this bus go to the museum?

items.zhPrompt: 那我應該改搭什麼？
items.answer: What should I take instead?

items.zhPrompt: 下一班車十分鐘後出發。
items.answer: The next bus leaves in ten minutes.

items.zhPrompt: 如果月台改了，你會問工作人員什麼？
items.answer: Where should I go now?
items.hint: 只給中文情境，自己組句子。

items.zhPrompt: 你要請對方指出正確站牌。
items.answer: Can you show me the right stop?
items.hint: 只給中文情境，自己組句子。

items.zhPrompt: 你在網站看到「Use Stop C after six p.m.」，要怎麼向朋友說明？
items.answer: The notice says to use Stop C after six p.m.
items.hint: 只給中文情境，自己轉述公告。

items.zhPrompt: 你要確認 10:10 的船還有票嗎？
items.answer: Is the 10:10 boat still available?

items.zhPrompt: 第一班船 9:20 出發。
items.answer: The first boat leaves at 9:20 a.m.

items.zhPrompt: 這艘船從 2 號碼頭出發。
items.answer: The boat leaves from Dock 2.

items.zhPrompt: 第一班售罄時，你要問可以改搭什麼。
items.answer: What can I take instead?

items.zhPrompt: 你沒聽清楚登船時間，請對方再說一次。
items.answer: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you say the boarding time again?

items.zhPrompt: 9:20 售罄，你要問能不能改搭 10:10。
items.answer: Can I take the 10:10 boat instead? / Is there another boat?
items.hint: 只給中文情境，自己組句子。

items.zhPrompt: 你發現 ATM 在附近一個街區外。
items.answer: The ATM is one block away. / The ATM is nearby, one block from here.
items.hint: 只給中文情境，自己組句子。

items.zhPrompt: 請櫃檯人員確認回程時間。
items.answer: Can the clerk check the return time?
items.hint: 只給中文情境，自己組句子。

items.zhPrompt: 你要提醒朋友乘客必須提早 15 分鐘到。
items.answer: Passengers need to arrive 15 minutes early.
items.hint: 只給中文情境，自己組句子。

items.zhPrompt: 網站顯示票可以線上購買，你要怎麼轉述？
items.answer: The tickets are available online. / You can buy the tickets online.
items.hint: 只給中文情境，自己轉述網頁資訊。

items.zhPrompt: 你要確認前往圖書館的 4 號出口。
items.answer: Which way should I go for Exit 4?
items.hint: 提示：Which way should I go for ...?

items.zhPrompt: 你要告訴朋友搭綠線到 2 號月台。
items.answer: Take the Green Line to Platform 2.
items.hint: 提示：Take the Green Line to ...

items.zhPrompt: 你要告訴朋友 4 號出口開放到晚上 10 點。
items.answer: Exit 4 is open until 10 p.m.

items.zhPrompt: 你要請站務員指給你去 City Library 的路。
items.answer: Could you show me the way to the City Library?

items.zhPrompt: 你沒聽清楚出口號碼，請對方再說一次。
items.answer: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you say the exit again?

items.zhPrompt: 告示改了出口，你要問現在該去哪裡。
items.answer: Where should I go now?

items.zhPrompt: 電梯不能用，你要問能不能改走樓梯。
items.answer: Can I use the stairs instead? / Should I go upstairs?
items.hint: 只給中文情境，自己組句子。

items.zhPrompt: 你在另一個車站，要確認這是不是去售票處的方向。
items.answer: Is this the right way to the ticket office? / Which way should I go?
items.hint: 只給中文情境，轉移今天的問路句型。

items.zhPrompt: 你要告訴朋友直走、右轉，再跟著綠色標誌走。
items.answer: Go straight, turn right, and follow the green sign.
items.hint: 只給中文情境，轉移今天的方向片語。

items.zhPrompt: 地圖顯示出口變更，你要詢問是否有替代方案。
items.answer: The exit changed. Is there another option? / What should I do instead?
items.hint: 只給中文情境，自己轉述資訊改變。

items.zhPrompt: 公告說藍線受到軌道工程影響。
items.answer: The Blue Line is affected by track work.

items.zhPrompt: 8:30 的火車今天取消了。
items.answer: The 8:30 train is cancelled today.

items.zhPrompt: 公告說接駁巴士從 4 號月台出發。
items.answer: A replacement bus leaves from Platform 4.

items.zhPrompt: 乘客應提早十分鐘到，並出示同一張票。
items.answer: Passengers should arrive ten minutes early and show the same ticket.

items.zhPrompt: 你要確認接駁巴士會不會到 Central Station。
items.answer: Does the replacement bus go to Central Station?

items.zhPrompt: 工作人員說巴士在 C 站接乘客。
items.answer: The bus picks up passengers at Stop C.
items.hint: 只給中文情境，自己說出接載地點。

items.zhPrompt: 你沒聽清楚地點，請對方再說一次並問現在該去哪裡。
items.answer: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Where should I go now?

items.zhPrompt: 工作人員告訴你過樓梯後左轉。
items.answer: Turn left after the stairs.
items.hint: 只給中文情境，轉移今天的方向句型。

items.zhPrompt: 你在網頁看到商店今天關閉，要向朋友轉述。
items.answer: The notice says the store is closed today.
items.hint: 只給中文情境，轉述英文公告。

items.zhPrompt: 這個入口關閉了，你要詢問另一個選項。
items.answer: This entrance is closed. Is there another option?
items.hint: 只給中文情境，轉移替代方案句型。

items.zhPrompt: 旅館資訊寫著早餐包含在住宿內。
items.answer: Breakfast is included with the stay.

items.zhPrompt: 你要問退房後能不能把行李寄放在這裡。
items.answer: Can I leave my luggage here after checkout?

items.zhPrompt: 早餐供應時間是七點到十點。
items.answer: Breakfast is served from 7:00 to 10:00.

items.zhPrompt: 早餐室在二樓。
items.answer: The breakfast room is on Floor 2.

items.zhPrompt: 行李寄放服務在接待櫃檯。
items.answer: Luggage storage is available at reception.

items.zhPrompt: 你沒聽清楚領取時間是五點還是六點。
items.answer: Sorry, did you say five or six?

items.zhPrompt: 最後確認：早餐有包含，行李可以寄放到五點。
items.answer: I want to make sure: breakfast is included, and I can leave my luggage here until five.
items.hint: 用 I want to make sure 開頭。

items.zhPrompt: 早餐室在樓上。上樓後直走。
items.answer: The breakfast room is upstairs. Go straight after the stairs.
items.hint: 使用 2 天前的 upstairs 和 straight。

items.zhPrompt: 在博物館參觀前，你要問能不能把行李寄放在這裡。
items.answer: Can I leave my luggage here during the tour?
items.hint: 把今天的寄放句型移到博物館。

items.zhPrompt: 在車站，你想確認這班火車是直達車。
items.answer: I want to make sure this train is direct.
items.hint: 把 I want to make sure 移到交通情境。

items.zhPrompt: 你在手機上先查看咖啡店菜單。
items.answer: I need to check the menu first.
items.sourceTitle: Reading a Café Menu and Ordering Lunch

items.zhPrompt: 你要向咖啡店點一份午餐套餐。
items.answer: Could I get the lunch set, please?
items.sourceTitle: Reading a Café Menu and Ordering Lunch

items.zhPrompt: 你想確認飲料是否包含在套餐裡。
items.answer: Is a drink included with the set?
items.sourceTitle: Reading a Café Menu and Ordering Lunch

items.zhPrompt: 你要告訴朋友午餐套餐的價格。
items.answer: The lunch set costs NT$180.
items.sourceTitle: Reading a Café Menu and Ordering Lunch

items.zhPrompt: 你要說套餐可以選一種配料。
items.answer: The set includes one topping.
items.sourceTitle: Reading a Café Menu and Ordering Lunch

items.zhPrompt: 你要告訴朋友取餐時間是 12:20。
items.answer: Pickup is at 12:20.
items.sourceTitle: Reading a Café Menu and Ordering Lunch

items.zhPrompt: 你沒聽清楚對方說的尺寸，請他再說一次。
items.answer: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you say the size again?
items.sourceTitle: Reading a Café Menu and Ordering Lunch

items.zhPrompt: 在機場咖啡店，你想要一杯水。
items.answer: Could I get a glass of water, please?
items.sourceTitle: Reading a Café Menu and Ordering Lunch
items.hint: 把 Could I get ...? 移到新的地點。

items.zhPrompt: 如果午餐套餐賣完了，你要問另一個選項。
items.answer: If the lunch set is sold out, what is another option?
items.sourceTitle: Reading a Café Menu and Ordering Lunch

items.zhPrompt: 你在網頁上注意到飲料包含在套餐裡，要轉述給朋友。
items.answer: I notice that a drink is included with the set. / The menu says a drink is included with the set.
items.sourceTitle: Reading a Café Menu and Ordering Lunch
items.hint: 使用 notice 和 included with the set；答案可有不同說法。
